queries.question: Show non-fiction books and fiction books with review rating higher than 4.
queries.sql:
SELECT Books.title 
FROM Books JOIN reviews ON Books.id = reviews.book_id
WHERE (Books.literature = "Non-fiction Book" OR Books.literature = "Fiction Book") AND reviews.rating > 4
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?books a :Books .
  ?reviews a :Reviews .
  ?reviews p:hasBooks ?books .
  ?books p:title ?title .
  ?books p:literature ?literature_w .
  ?books p:literature ?literature_w2 .
  ?reviews p:rating ?rating_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?literature_w) = "Non-fiction Book" || STR(?literature_w2) = "Fiction Book")) && xsd:double(?rating_w) > 4))
}

queries.question: Show non-fiction books and fiction books with review rating higher than 4.
queries.sql:
SELECT Books.title 
FROM Books JOIN reviews ON Books.id = reviews.book_id
WHERE Books.literature = "Non-fiction Book" OR Books.literature = "Fiction Book" AND reviews.rating > 4
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?books a :Books .
  ?reviews a :Reviews .
  ?reviews p:hasBooks ?books .
  ?books p:title ?title .
  ?books p:literature ?literature_w .
  ?books p:literature ?literature_w2 .
  ?reviews p:rating ?rating_w .
  FILTER((STR(?literature_w) = "Non-fiction Book" || (STR(?literature_w2) = "Fiction Book" && xsd:double(?rating_w) > 4)))
}
